prompt.content: Please make a new doc with an open-ended question for the unit exam asking students to explain the meaning of the following quote from the novel To Kill A Mockingbird: “until you climb into his skin and walk around in it”. Provide both the state code and description of the relevant standard. Note the chapter/page number where the quote appears in the full text PDF version.
